name: Varonis Systems, Inc.
description: Varonis Systems, Inc. is a leading provider of AI-powered data security solutions designed to protect enterprise data across on-premises and cloud environments. The company's platform continuously discovers and classifies sensitive information, remediates access risks, and detects advanced cyber threats by analyzing data activity and user behavior. By unifying data security, governance, and threat detection into a single, automated solution, Varonis helps organizations secure their most critical assets, ensure regulatory compliance, and prevent data breaches in an increasingly complex digital landscape.
